subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! O ye children of His Kingdom! Verily, verily, the new heaven and the new earth are come.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله و ابناء ملکوت الله ان السماء الجدیده قد اتت و ان الارض الجدیده
subcodes.subjects: @return of Christ; second coming of Christ, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @presence of; reunion with God, @angels, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @continual renewal of creation, @prophecy and fulfillment
